name: Shukla The Tiger
overview: Series inspired by a famous gangster of Gorkhapur in the 90s, who was known among many politicians of UP/BIHAR. First time in India, a "Special Task Force" (STF) was formed to get hold of him.

trailers.title: Shukla - The Tiger || Official Trailer || Ravi Bhatia || Shafaq Naaz || MX player
